name: sourcey.package
description: Package a completed Sourcey run into a reusable Sourcey packet.

discovery_report.description: Discovery report emitted by the Sourcey discover step.

doc_bundle.description: Doc bundle emitted by the Sourcey author step.

project_brief.description: Optional grounded brief supplied to the Sourcey run.

sourcey_build_report.description: Sourcey build report emitted by sourcey.build.

evaluation_report.description: Evaluation report emitted by the critique step.

revision_bundle.description: Revision bundle emitted by the revise step.
